Cursive Terminal Themes

33 Beautiful Themes for Your Cursive Coding Experience

Quick Install

git clone github.com/midnightnow/Cursive-Terminal && cd Cursive-Terminal/scripts && ./install-all-themes.sh
// Cursive Elegance
function elegance() {
return 'Beautiful cursive code';
}
✨ Cursive Elegance
Purple/Gold - Sophisticated and elegant
// Vampire's Letter
function darkMagic() {
return 'Coding in shadows';
}
🧛 Vampire's Letter
Black/Red - Dark velvet night
// Pirate's Scroll
function treasureMap() {
return 'X marks the spot';
}
🏴‍☠️ Pirate's Scroll
Brown/Gold - Weather-beaten parchment
// Rainbow
function prism() {
return 'Colorful code';
}
🌈 Rainbow Prism
Dark/Vibrant - Rainbow highlights
// Ancient Papyrus
function wisdom() {
return 'Timeless elegance';
}
📜 Ancient Papyrus
Beige/Brown - Aged papyrus
